name: vadentalcare-redesign-platform
description: Production-shaped redesign platform for Virginia Dental Care: Next.js web/PWA, NestJS API, and PMS integration boundary.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @vadentalcare/shared && concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @vadentalcare/web" "npm run dev -w @vadentalcare/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @vadentalcare/shared && npm run build -w @vadentalcare/api && npm run build -w @vadentalcare/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @vadentalcare/shared && npm run build -w @vadentalcare/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @vadentalcare/shared && npm run typecheck -w @vadentalcare/api && npm run typecheck -w @vadentalcare/web
